original_image_tags: Dark gray document page, appears to be a photograph or scan of a typed page on dark paper or film. The page has two hole-punch circles visible on the left margin and one at the bottom center. There are faint light streaks or scratches vertically across the lower half of the page. A handwritten number "5-2" appears in the lower right corner.
White, bold, stencil-like stamped text reading "RESTRICTED" is centered at the very bottom of the dark page.

elements.description: Page containing typed text at the top and the word 'RESTRICTED' stamped at the top and bottom. There are two hole-punches on the left margin. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts are present.

judge.reason: The descriptions contradict on the position of the stamped 'RESTRICTED' text and disagree on the presence of other visual elements like scratches and a handwritten number.
